query: SELECT ca.id, ca.alunoId, ca.programId, ca.periodoInicio, ca.periodoTermino, ca.totalSessoesContratadas, ca.isActive, a.name, a.tipoMentoria, a.contratoInicio, a.contratoFim FROM contratos_aluno ca JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ca.alunoId WHERE ca.isActive = 1 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ca.id, ca.alunoId, ca.programId, ca.periodoInicio, ca.periodoTermino, ca.totalSessoesContratadas, ca.isActive, a.name, a.tipoMentoria, a.contratoInicio, a.contratoFim FROM contratos_aluno ca JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ca.alunoId WHERE ca.isActive = 1 LIMIT 10;
